title: 工具执行失败: read_file
content:
--- 文件: tests/test_compression_engine.py (第 1 至 260 行，共 469 行) ---
   1 | # tests/test_compression_engine.py
   2 | """
   3 | 压缩引擎测试
   4 | 
   5 | 测试覆盖：
   6 | 1. 4 种压缩策略（LLM_SUMMARY/KEYFRAME/SLIDING_WINDOW/IMPORTANCE_FILTER）
   7 | 2. 策略选择器
   8 | 3. 压缩效果
   9 | 4. 集成到 ContextManager
  10 | """
  11 | 
  12 | import pytest
  13 | import asyncio
  14 | from typing import List, Dict, Any
  15 | 
  16 | from core.compression_engine import (
  17 |     CompressionEngine,
  18 |     CompressionStrategy,
  19 |     CompressionResult,
  20 |     select_compression_strategy
  21 | )
  22 | from core.memory_models import SessionSummary
  23 | from core.context import ContextManager
  24 | 
  25 | 
  26 | # ========== 辅助函数 ==========
  27 | 
  28 | def create_mock_messages(count: int, role_pattern: str = "mixed") -> List[Dict[str, Any]]:
  29 |     """
  30 |     创建模拟消息列表
  31 | 
  32 |     Args:
  33 |         count: 消息数量
  34 |         role_pattern: 角色模式
  35 |             - "mixed": 混合角色（user/assistant/tool）
  36 |             - "error": 错误密集
  37 |             - "tool": 工具密集
  38 |             - "simple": 简单对话（user/assistant）
  39 | 
  40 |     Returns:
  41 |         消息列表
  42 |     """
  43 |     messages = []
  44 | 
  45 |     if role_pattern == "mixed":
  46 |         for i in range(count):
  47 |             if i % 3 == 0:
  48 |                 messages.append({"role": "user", "content": f"任务 {i}"})
  49 |             elif i % 3 == 1:
  50 |                 messages.append({"role": "assistant", "content": f"回复 {i}", "tool_calls": [{"id": f"tc_{i}", "type": "function", "function": {"name": "bash", "arguments": ""}}]})
  51 |             else:
  52 |                 messages.append({"role": "tool", "content": f"工具结果 {i}", "tool_call_id": f"tc_{i}"})
  53 | 
  54 |     elif role_pattern == "error":
  55 |         for i in range(count):
  56 |             if i % 4 == 0:
  57 |                 messages.append({"role": "user", "content": f"任务 {i}"})
  58 |             elif i % 4 == 1:
  59 |                 messages.append({"role": "assistant", "content": f"回复 {i}", "tool_calls": [{"id": f"tc_{i}", "type": "function", "function": {"name": "bash", "arguments": ""}}]})
  60 |             elif i % 4 == 2:
  61 |                 messages.append({"role": "tool", "content": f"Error: 失败 {i}", "tool_call_id": f"tc_{i}"})
  62 |             else:
  63 |                 messages.append({"role": "assistant", "content": f"Traceback: 错误 {i}"})
  64 | 
  65 |     elif role_pattern == "tool":
  66 |         for i in range(count):
  67 |             if i % 2 == 0:
  68 |                 messages.append({"role": "user", "content": f"任务 {i}"})
  69 |             else:
  70 |                 messages.append({"role": "assistant", "content": f"工具调用 {i}", "tool_calls": [{"id": f"tc_{i}", "type": "function", "function": {"name": "bash", "arguments": ""}}]})
  71 |                 messages.append({"role": "tool", "content": f"工具结果 {i}", "tool_call_id": f"tc_{i}"})
  72 | 
  73 |     elif role_pattern == "simple":
  74 |         for i in range(count):
  75 |             if i % 2 == 0:
  76 |                 messages.append({"role": "user", "content": f"任务 {i}"})
  77 |             else:
  78 |                 messages.append({"role": "assistant", "content": f"回复 {i}"})
  79 | 
  80 |     return messages
  81 | 
  82 | 
  83 | async def mock_llm_summarizer(prompt: str) -> str:
  84 |     """
  85 |     模拟 LLM 摘要函数
  86 | 
  87 |     Returns:
  88 |         JSON 格式的摘要文本
  89 |     """
  90 |     return """
  91 |     {
  92 |         "task_goal": "完成测试任务",
  93 |         "task_status": "in_progress",
  94 |         "files_changed": [],
  95 |         "errors_encountered": [],
  96 |         "tools_used": [],
  97 |         "key_decisions": [],
  98 |         "summary_text": "这是一个测试摘要"
  99 |     }
 100 |     """
 101 | 
 102 | 
 103 | # ========== 测试 1: 压缩引擎初始化 ==========
 104 | 
 105 | def test_compression_engine_init():
 106 |     """测试压缩引擎初始化"""
 107 |...
